scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Anusuchit Jati / Anusuchit Janjati Udyami Yojana
page_title: Mukhyamantri Anusuchit Jati / Anusuchit Janjati Udyami Yojana

details: The “Mukhyamantri Anusuchit Jati / Anusuchit Janjaati Udyami Yojana” is a component of the umbrella scheme “Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana”, launched by the Department of Industries, Bihar. The main objective of the scheme is to promote entrepreneurship and self-employment among individuals from all categories in the state.

Under this component, financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided to applicants from the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Class for establishing and operating business ventures, thereby fostering economic growth and empowerment in the state.
benefits: Receive up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up a business (50% of the total financial assistance (up to ₹5,00,000/-) is provided as a non-repayable grant. The remaining 50% (up to ₹5,00,000/-) is offered as an interest-free loan, with a nominal 1% interest under specific sub-schemes.)
Mandatory training sessions are provided to enhance entrepreneurial skills.
eligibility: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Bihar.
The applicant must belong to the Schedule Castes (SC)/ Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.
The applicant should have passed at least 10+2, Intermediate, ITI, Polytechnic Diploma, or equivalent.
The applicant must be aged between 18 and 50 years.
The business unit must be a proprietorship or partnership firm.

online: A new page will open where you need to enter your Aadhaar number and create a desired password.
Click on the "Login" option after entering the details.
A registration form will appear. Fill in the required details carefully.
Once completed, click on the "Submit" button to finalize your registration.
to the portal using your Aadhaar number and password.
The application form will appear on your dashboard. Fill in the form accurately with all the necessary details.
Upload all the required documents as specified in the instructions.
Review the application to ensure all information is correct.
Click on the "Submit" button to complete the application process.
Download and print the acknowledgment receipt for your records. Keep it safe for future correspondence.

documents_required: Matriculation certificate (in which date of birth is mentioned).

faqs.question: What is the “Mukhyamantri Anusoochit Jati / Anusoochit Janajaati Udyami Yojana”?
faqs.answer: The “Mukhyamantri Anusoochit Jati / Anusoochit Janajaati Udyami Yojana” is a component of the “Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana” aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and self-employment among Scheduled Caste (SC) and Scheduled Tribe (ST) individuals in Bihar.

faqs.question: Who launched this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme was launched by the Department of Industries, Bihar, as part of the umbrella scheme “Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana.”

faqs.question: What financial assistance is provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided, with ₹5,00,000/- as a non-repayable grant and ₹5,00,000/- as an interest-free loan.

faqs.question: Is there any interest on the loan component?
faqs.answer: The loan is interest-free; however, a nominal 1% interest may apply under specific sub-schemes.

faqs.question: What type of businesses are eligible under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible businesses must be registered as proprietorship or partnership firms.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Bihar, belong to the SC/ST category, have completed at least 10+2 or an equivalent qualification, and be aged between 18 and 50 years.

faqs.question: What educational qualifications are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Applicants should have passed at least 10+2, Intermediate, ITI, Polytechnic Diploma, or an equivalent qualification.

faqs.question: What is the age limit to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant must be between 18 and 50 years old.

faqs.question: Is training provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, mandatory training sessions are conducted to enhance the entrepreneurial skills of the applicants.

faqs.question: How can applicants use the financial assistance?
faqs.answer: The funds can be used for establishing and operating business ventures, including setting up infrastructure, purchasing equipment, and other necessary expenses.

faqs.question: Are both men and women eligible to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, both men and women belonging to the SC/ST category in Bihar are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How can applicants apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicants can register and apply through the official portal or designated government offices.

faqs.question: What happens after the application is submitted?
faqs.answer: After submission, the application is reviewed, and eligible applicants are invited for training. Once the training is completed, financial assistance is disbursed in installments.
